approaches.title: HashMap Frequency Count
approaches.summary: Use a HashMap to count character frequencies in magazine and decrement for ransom note.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Initial implementation using HashMap for frequency counting.

approaches.title: Fixed Array with Offset
approaches.summary: Use a fixed-size array to count character frequencies with ASCII offset for efficiency.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Optimized to fixed array for better performance and reduced overhead.
